---
title: "PeroxiBot: AI Research Assistant powered by NotebookLM"
---

PeroxiBot is powered by [NotebookLM](https://notebooklm.google.com), Google's AI 
research assistant. It has been trained on a curated collection of scientific papers 
covering the PEX26-F51L mutation, peroxisome biogenesis disorders, and the link between 
peroxisomal dysfunction and sensorineural hearing loss.

PeroxiBot answers questions based strictly on the uploaded research papers and cites
its sources for every response.

[💬 Open PeroxiBot](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/6c5550cb-f1e7-475b-89b1-9422fa615f96/preview){target="_blank"}
